reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 1 (Dead Code): PASSED - Handler is actively registered in Fulu fork map (rpc.go:51) and reachable via P2P RPC. Gate 2 (Trust Boundary): PASSED - Attack path is via P2P network (UNTRUSTED entry point per BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json trust_assumptions). Gate 3 (Code Verification): PASSED - Code reading is factually correct: blobSidecarByRootRPCHandler (L26-109) contains no epoch-based deprecation check; handler continues serving requests as long as data exists in retention window; no rejection when current_epoch >= FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS. Gate 4 (Exploitability): PASSED - Attacker can trigger this by sending blob_sidecars_by_root RPC requests after the deprecation deadline, delaying PeerDAS migration network-wide and enabling resource exhaustion via legacy paths. Gate 5 (Spec Cross-Reference): 01e property PROP-6a4369e9-inv-035 from outputs/01e_PARTIAL_W2B3_1771748669.json (L895-912) states: 'blob_sidecars_by_root must be fully deprecated after FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS' with assertion 'current_epoch >= FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_BLOB_SIDECARS_REQUESTS => respond_empty_or_reject'. Code deviates from this requirement - handler serves data instead of rejecting. Gate 6 (Scope Check): PASSED - Protocol compliance bugs affecting network-wide migration are in-scope. Verdict: CONFIRMED_POTENTIAL - Clear spec deviation exists (handler lacks required deprecation logic), attack path is confirmed (P2P requests post-deadline), but network-wide impact depends on whether the spec actually requires hard rejection vs. allowing nodes to optionally serve legacy data during transition. The spec language 'must be fully deprecated' suggests mandatory rejection, but implementation may reflect intended operational flexibility. Severity rationale: Medium severity is appropriate - affects migration timeline and enables resource usage via deprecated paths, but does not cause consensus splits or validator slashing. Prysm's 31% consensus client share (BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json) caps maximum impact below High threshold (33%).
reviewed_items.spec_reference: blob_sidecars_by_root must be fully deprecated after FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS. Assertion: current_epoch >= FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_BLOB_SIDECARS_REQUESTS => respond_empty_or_reject. (01e_PARTIAL_W2B3_1771748669.json)
